name: shipping-method-selector
title: Shipping Method Selector
description: A shipping method selector lets a checkout user compare delivery/pickup options by cost and timing in one glance, and binds the choice directly to the order total. Baymard's checkout-flow research treats a total that changes unexpectedly after this step as a trust problem — so selecting a method must recalculate the visible total immediately, not just at final confirmation.
docs: Recipe contract (intent/anatomy/tokens/checks/anti-patterns): https://ui.askewly.com/llms/recipes/commerce/shipping-method-selector.md — after transplant, remap look to the project's own tokens per https://ui.askewly.com/llms/docs/design-system/component-restyle.md
